creator: tmclaugh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports-bugs->tmclaugh

This is an issue because a version of openssl from the ports tree is 
installed.  Your workaround is one fix.  The other is to remove the 
openssl port if it's not needed and rebuild the ports that were 
previously linked to its libcrypto.  libchk will help find the affected 
files.
